entry.title: Using secondary data source in Fiori building blocks
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I'm developing an app that has multiple data sources, the app is a List report floorplan that opens a dialog fragment with a macros:FilterBar component inside it.

The List report uses the default model pointing to /primaryService/MainEntity and the filterBar needs to consume /secondaryService/OtherEntity, however the filterBar component fails because is trying to find /OtherEntity in /primaryService path.

Is there a way to bind the dialog or the inner filterBar to use the secondaryModel?


Some code for context.

Dialog.fragment.xml

 

<core:FragmentDefinition  id="dialogFragment" xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc" xmlns:macros="sap.fe.macros" >
    <Dialog title="Custom Form" id="formDialog">
        <!-- Other unrelated fields -->
        <macros:FilterBar filterChanged="handler.onFilterChange" id="FilterBar" metaPath="/OtherEntity/@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.SelectionFields" />
    </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

 

button.js - function that opens the modal

 

async function openModal(oEvent) {
    const oView = this.editFlow.getView();
    const oController = oView.getController();
    const extension = oController.getExtensionAPI()
    var oModel = this.getModel("secondaryModel");
    oView.setModel(oModel, "secondaryModel");
    const initialBindingContext = new sap.ui.model.Context(oModel, "/OtherEntity")
    oView.setBindingContext(initialBindingContext, "secondaryModel")
    let dialog = await extension.loadFragment({
        contextPath: "/OtherEntity",
        id: 'fragmentDialogId',
        name: "jobui.ext.fragment.FormDialog",
        controller: this,
        initialBindingContext: initialBindingContext
    })
    oView.addDependent(dialog)
    dialog.open()
}

 

 manifest.json (simplified)

 

{
    "sap.app": {
      "dataSources": {
        "mainService": {
          "uri": "odata/mainService/",
          "type": "OData",
          "settings": {
            "annotations": [],
            "odataVersion": "4.0"
          }
        },
        "secondaryService": {
          "uri": "/odata/secondaryService/",
          "type": "OData",
          "settings": {
            "odataVersion": "4.0"
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "sap.ui5": {
        "": {
          "dataSource": "mainService",
          "preload": true,
          "settings": {
          }
        },
        "secondaryModel": {
          "dataSource": "secondaryService",
          "preload": true,
          "settings": {
        }
    } 
  }

entry.title: SAP Fiori Application Generator: How to connect to a bearer authenticated OData Service?
entry.content:
I have been experimenting with generating applications using the SAP Fiori Application Generator npm extension. I do not face any issue connecting to my locally run mock OData service during step 2: connect to a data source, which does not require any authentication.

However, the extension only seems to support connecting to an OData service that has been set up with basic authentication (i.e. requires a username and password). However, my live OData service has been set up with bearer authentication.

I have the following questions:

  1. How can I connect to my bearer authenticated OData service using the SAP Fiori Application Generator extension?
  2. If this isn't possible, how can I manually set up my app to support this?

entry.title: How to deploy full stack cloud application(CAP + SAPUI5) to BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Can someone help to deploy Full Stack Cloud Application to Cloud Foundry which is developed in BAS using CAP and SAPUI5?.  I am not using SAP Hana Cloud or any kind of  database. Its getting data from S/4 Hana Public Cloud system with destination.

I tried to deploy, it got deployed successfully but when i access app using provided URL, i am getting one error in logs as "msg":"x-forwarded-path header: undefined"} and "msg":"query does not exist for request url /"}. Please help me if someone came across this kind of situation.

I appreciate your response in advance.

Regards,

Omkar B.

entry.title: GO Button(Fiori List Report). When Press GO button should Validate Selection fields
entry.content:
I have created report by using List Report (Fiori template) with CDS odata service.

Requirement: Without entering any input values on Selection Fields user Press GO button should give the error message like "Please do not run without selection fields input" and not display the data.

Basically I need to validate selection fields when press GO button

If anybody is done this same scenario kindly provide the details of code with place holders.

Thanks, 

Subba Reddy

entry.title: Dispatcher and message server are in grey while starting the SAP
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Greetings

while starting the SAP server using Sap controls some services are not coming up like message server and dispatcher could you please suggest me the best way to troubleshoot the issue.

Note: we have copied the PRD data to SBX server. While starting the server we are encounter the issue and Database is up and running.

Thanks 

Maladri

entry.title: column width alignment missing for drop down values in SAP UI5 application.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am facing column width issue in my SAP UI5 application. For Enter Code column, if there are no dropdown values it should be disabled and if there are drop down values it should display the drop down values. Please let me know how to correct the column alignment.

Below is my code in my view.xml file. 

                <IconTabFilter id="iconTabBarTakeReading" text="{i18n>TakeReading}" icon="sap-icon://measurement-document" count="{detailView>/CountMeasuringData}">
                                <Table id="bindMeasuringPoint" noDataText="{i18n>lblNoMeasuringData}" alternateRowColors="true" headerText="{i18n>ttlMeasuringData}"
                                       class="sapUiResponsiveMargin" autoPopinMode="true" >
                                    <columns>
                                        <Column demandPopin="true" hAlign="Begin">
                                            <Text text="{i18n>lblMeasuringPoint}"/>
                                        </Column>
                                        <Column demandPopin="true" hAlign="Begin">
                                            <Text text="{i18n>lblMeasuringDescription}"/>
                                        </Column>
                                        <Column demandPopin="true" hAlign="Begin">
                                            <Text text="{i18n>lblEnterReading}"/>                                            
                                        </Column>
                                        <Column id="column50">
                                            <header>
                                                <Text text="{i18n>lblValuationCode}"/>
                                            </header>
                                        </Column>
                                        <Column demandPopin="true" hAlign="Begin" width="7rem">
                                            <Text text="{i18n>lblUoM}"/>
                                        </Column>
                                        <Column demandPopin="true" hAlign="Begin">
                                            <Text text="{i18n>lblLastReading}"/>
                                        </Column>
                                        <Column id="column51">
                                            <header>
                                                <Text text="{i18n>lblPreviousValuationCode}"/>
                                            </header>
                                        </Column>                                        
                                    </columns>
                                    <items>
                                        <ColumnListItem id="_IDGenColumnListItem">
                                            <cells>
                                                <Text id="_IDGenText" text="{POINT}" />
                                                <Text id="_IDGenText1" text="{PTTXT}"/>
                                                <Input width="100%" id="read123" enabled="{= ${MRNGU} === '' ? false : true}" value="{EnterReading}"
                                                       maxLength="8" type="Number" liveChange="liveChangefn"/>                                                                                                                                                        
                                                <Select id="_IDSelect" enabled="{= ${NOCOD} === '' ? false : true}"
                                                        width="100%" selectedKey="{VLCOD}" items="{ path: 'MpointToVcodeNav/results'}">
                                                    <items>
                                                        <core:Item id="_IDGenItem" key="{VLCOD}" text="{VTEXT}" />
                                                    </items>
                                                </Select>
                                                <Text id="_IDGenText2" text="{RECDU}"/>
                                                <Text id="_IDGenText3" text="{READG}"/>
                                                <Text id="_IDGenText4" text="{KURZTEXT}"/>
                                            </cells>
                                        </ColumnListItem>
                                    </items>
                                </Table>
                            </IconTabFilter>

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: Whether to use rowspan during cap development
entry.content:
I'm currently developing with CAP and would like to know how to use rowspan in the table header.

Currently, I've implemented the table in an XML file, and the screen appears like the photo provided.

 

 

I would like to change it to look like this using a functionality similar to rowspan . How can I achieve this?

 

 

xml file

<t:Table id="_IDTable" selectionMode="None" rowMode="Auto"
<t:columns >
<t:Column width="50px" >
<Label text="aaaaa" width="100%" textAlign="Center" />
<t:template>
<core:Icon src="{selectMeaValRegMap>status}" decorative="false"/>
</t:template>
</t:Column>
</t:columns>
</t:Table>

entry.title: How to enable the create button in the Flexible Programming Model?
entry.content:
Hi, everybody.

I have a problem with my custom page. I can currently see what I want but the create button is only visible when I enter edit mode. How do I make the button visible without having to edit some record?

I am using a service made in CAP and I have draft enabled.

Edit mode

Reading mode

entry.title: How to use rowspan when developing ui5
entry.content:
I'm currently developing with CAP and would like to know how to use rowspan in the table header.

Currently, I've implemented the table in an XML file, and the screen appears like the photo provided.

I would like to change it to look like this using a functionality similar to rowspan . How can I achieve this?

 

xml file

<t:Table id="_IDTable" selectionMode="None" rowMode="Auto"
<t:columns >
<t:Column width="50px" id="col2">
<Label text="aaaaa" width="100%" textAlign="Center" />
<t:template>
<core:Icon src="{selectMeaValRegMap>status}" decorative="false"/>
</t:template>
</t:Column>
</t:columns>
</t:Table>

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

controller file

this.byId("col2").setHeaderSpan([3,1]);

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


If i do it this way, it only merges horizontally.
Is there a way to merge vertically?

entry.title: How to do navigation in smarttable from master to detail page
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need help in navigation and routing using parameters in smarttable. I have done it in normal table and list but not able to do in smarttable [not able to fetch data in details page]. Thank you all in advance. There should be smartfilterbar also...

entry.title: SAP Fiori List Report - OData V4: List Not Refreshing automatically After Action (change)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

A few months ago, I built a Fiori List Report app for the SD module using OData V2 in an on-premise environment. The app had actions like "Remove Block," "Add Block," and "Add Comment," and it worked perfectly—after each action, the list report refreshed automatically and displayed the updated data.

Recently, I created a similar app as a Fiori List Report app, but this time using OData V4 in the same on-premise environment. Unfortunately, the actions no longer refresh the list report after submitting changes always I had to click "GO" in order to get it the list refreshed.

Steps Taken to Identify the Issue:

  1. Adjusted the UI5 Version to both newer and older versions.
  2. Implemented side effects using guided development tools.
  3. Compared the manifest.json, metadata.XML and other app components between the old (OData V2) and new (OData V4) apps and found significant differences.

Despite thorough testing and troubleshooting, I couldn’t resolve the issue.

Request:

Could someone guide me on how to ensure the list report refreshes properly after an action in a Fiori List Report app using OData V4?

Thank you in advance for your help!

Attached are the old and the new manifest

entry.title: sapui5 unable to create a component visual studio code
entry.content:
Hello,

i am working with vscode - created some apps - works fine.

now i want to create a component (in manifest sap.app type = component)

is this not supported in vscode ?

as soon as i set the type to component - i can almost do nothing in the application info (for example add deploy config).

so my question would be how to create and deploy components in vscode ?

thanks for your help

Helmut

entry.title: SAP ASE HADR with FaultManager and Virtual IP on Windows
entry.content:
Does someone has SAP ASE HADR running on the Windows Platform?
We have 2x ASE instance, 1x Faultmanager on Windows 2022. All is installed except for the FM Virtual IP option.
We would like to know how to setup the Virtual IP part with the FaultManager.

Regards,

Harry Splinter

entry.title: Issue with focus, scroll after SAPUI5 upgrade
entry.content:
Before SAPUI5 upgrade:
// handle tap for active toolbar, do nothing if already handled
Toolbar.prototype.ontap = function(oEvent) {
if (this.getActive() && !oEvent.isMarked()) {
oEvent.setMarked();
this.firePress({
srcControl : oEvent.srcControl
});
}
};

 

After upgrade of SAPUI5:
y.prototype.ontap = function(t) {
if (this.getActive() && !t.isMarked() || t.srcControl === this._getActiveButton()) {
t.setMarked();
this.firePress({
srcControl: t.srcControl
});
this.focus() ==> problem with this line as the scroll moves to initial position to the top.
}
}


My code:

var template= new sap.m.VBox({
      items: [
        new sap.m.Toolbar({ }),
        new sap.m.Panel({
          expand: [oController.expandPanel, oController],
          expandable: true,
          growing: true,
          headerToolbar: [
            new sap.m.OverflowToolbar({
              active: true,
              growing: true,
              press: [oController.panelSelect, oController],
              content: [
                new sap.m.Text({
                  layoutData: new sap.m.OverflowToolbarLayoutData({
                    priority: sap.m.OverflowToolbarPriority.NeverOverflow
                  }),
                  width: "20rem",
                  wrapping: false,
                  text: "{testModel>localName}",
                }),
                new sap.m.ToolbarSeparator()
               
    });

    var scrollRight1 = new sap.m.ScrollContainer("scrollright", {
      vertical: true,
      horizontal: false,
      height: "200rem",
      content: [new sap.m.VBox({
        id: "scroll",
        width: "100%",
        height: "50%",
      }).bindAggregation("items", "testModel>/danger", Template)]
    });

panelSelect: function (oEvent) {
     // content
    }
 
After press event above the scroll moves to initial position.
before UI5 upgrade everything works perfect with the same code. But after upgrade have an issue in scroll.
Could you please suggest.

entry.title: Batch jobs information required
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We need SAP recommendation for below programs, can you please tell what is the use of below standard program and if we need to setup batch jobs for this program. If yes, what is the frequency.  

  1. UI5/APP_INDEX_CALCULATE - Component CA-UI5-ABA-AIDX
  2.  /UI5/UPD_ODATA_METADATA_CACHE - Component CA-UI5-ABA-AIDX

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Edit Multiple Selected Items Individually in a List Report Using an Action Button?
entry.content:
I have a List Report in my SAP Fiori Elements application, and I want to allow the user to select multiple lines and then click on an action button to edit each line individually.

Currently, my action button accepts a parameter where I can pass a single value. However, this value is static, meaning it applies the same value to all selected items, which doesn't allow flexibility for individual changes.

What I'm trying to achieve is the ability to dynamically pass different values (e.g., a unique part number) for each selected row when the button is clicked. I would like to know how I can flexibly manage dialog parameters for each selected item, or if there's a better approach to achieve this functionality in the context of a List Report with SAP RAP.

Has anyone implemented something similar or can suggest a solution for this scenario?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: How can i extract data from a table created in Flexible Programming Model custom page?
entry.content:
We have developed a CAPM application using the Flexible Programming Model (FPM) for the UI.
We need to retrieve the data from the table and send it to the backend Node.js layer for further processing. However, we are currently unable to fetch the entire table's data.

In the FPM application, selecting a particular row allows us to retrieve the data from the table, but our requirement is to fetch the entire table's data without selecting a row.

Could someone please help with this?

entry.title: sapui5 vscode problem when preview - component not found
entry.content:
Hello,

Maybe I can get some help...

in my vscode workspace I have two separate apps.

app1 zkdklsel is type component

app2 zkdtagesdok is type application

that is how app2 wants to use app1:

"resourceRoots": {
"zkdklsel": "./zkdklsel/webapp"
},
"componentUsages": {
"klientSelect": {
"name": "zkdklsel",
"settings": {},
"componentData": {
"singleSelect": false,
"dokVfTyp": "TDV2"
}
}
},

but i get an error on preview:

failed to load 'zkdklsel/Component.js' from ../zkdklsel/webapp/Component.js: script load error

i have tried and searched for so long and in many different ways, but i doesn't work.

And it should also work when deployed - so maybe i only have to set something in my ui5.yaml ?

thanks for your help

Helmut

entry.title: Calling Secured iFlow from SAPUI5
entry.content: Can somebody explain how can I call the Integration Flow SECURED Endpoint from SAP UI5? To call it in Postman, I first fetch the acess_token with token endpoint then request the json resource with that token. How do I implement it with SAP UI5, so the token of the currently logged in users is user? Also how make the SAP UI5 get the token when user logins? I implemented this scenario 100 time in Angluar and React with custom backend scenarios. There is literally 0 documentation on how to do this in the SAP environment.

entry.title: bind bound oData function to UI5 control
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

i want to bind a bound function to an control as described here: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/b54f7895b7594c61a83fa7257fa9d13f

we have great examples for unbound functions:

 

<VBox id="getAvailableItems" binding="{path : '/GetAvailableItems(...)', parameters : {$select : ['ProductName', 'ProductId']}}">
    <List id="xyz" items="{value}">
        <items>
            <ObjectListItem title="{ProductName}" />
        </items>
    </List>
</VBox>

 

but for bound functions only the js part is referenced:

 

var ...
    oSalesOrderContext = oTable.getSelectedItem().getBindingContext(),
    oAction = oModel.bindContext("name.space.InvoiceCreated(...)", oSalesOrderContext);
 
oAction.invoke()...

 

I've been trying to do this directly with a binding in the xml view for some time now, but it doesn't work. Has anyone got it working?
